reviews.comment:
Muy bueno.
Genial la atencion de todo el.personal tanto de la hosteria como del resto. Majo, una genia.
Los platos son abundantes y siempre cslientes.
La napo es para compartir.
Los desayunos bien, los fiambres creo q  podrian.mejorar

(Translated by Google)
Very good.
The service from all the staff, both at the inn and elsewhere, was fantastic. Majo, a genius.
The dishes are plentiful and always fresh.
The napo is meant to be shared.
The breakfasts were good; I think the cold cuts could be better.
